item.description: - Fixed two thin lines that appeared above and below a line when bold, italic, or underline formatting covered the full width of a note. - Numbered lists now renumber automatically when you add or remove an item in the middle of the list. - Starting a new list right after leaving another one no longer merges it into the list above. - The Settings window now moves only when you drag its title bar, and it no longer springs back to its original position.

- Refreshed the About and software update windows with a cleaner, simpler look. - The "All Notes" menu now shows a small dot for every note — filled when the note is open on screen, and an outline when it's closed. - Note titles in the menu now use the full width instead of cutting off early. - The delete button in the menu bar notes list stays neatly in place when you hover.

- Delete a note straight from the menu bar — hover over a note in the list and click the trash icon. - Added "Launch at startup" so CueNow opens automatically when you log in to your Mac. - Added an optional Error logging setting that records app activity to help troubleshoot issues. - Notes set to fully transparent now stay slightly visible so you can always find them. - The active-note dot in the menu bar now matches your Mac's accent color. - The Settings window now tucks away with Stage Manager like a normal app window. - Made the toggles in Settings smaller and tidier.
